title: Red Votive Candle Holders, Mercury Glass Tealight Candle Holder Set of 12, Perfect Centerpieces for Wedding, Party, Home Decor (Red)
features: Red glass candle holder: Each of our red candle holder made by leed-free glass. When you light candles, there will be warm light coming out which added an elegant and romantic atmosphere to your parties and home decor

COMMON SIZE: There are 12 votive candle holders in a set, and the size of each is approx 2.6” in height x 2.2” in diameter. It can be applied to all kinds of regular candles, flameless LED candles, and wax tealight candles less than 1.85" inner
IDEAL CENTERPIECES: The votive candle holder is the perfect decoration for holidays such as Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Valentine's day, wedding, birthday party, and home dec
SAFE PACKAGING: Our tealight candle holder using reinforced packaging to ensure that each glass holder can safely arrive at your hands,it's perfect for an excellent outside lighting accent
100% GUARANTEE: If there are any problems after receiving the glass candle holders, please contact us and we will solve them until you are satisfied
description: The perfect selection for your home, party, and holiday decor! Creating the unique elegant atmosphere in your private space, better enjoyment for you by placing the centerpiece. Specification: Quantity: 12 pack Color: Rose Gold Material: Mercury glass Dimension: Approximately 2.6” in height x 2.2” in diameter Wax tealight candles less than 1.85" inner
